eventText:
When "Worn with Sorrow and Toil" is in play, if a Companion in the Fellowship is taken as a casualty you may also discard one of the Free Peoples player's Character
Event cards from his hand (choosing it randomly) or from the table.
eventDiscardCondition: You must discard this card from the table immediately if the Fellowship is declared in an unconquered Free Peoples City or Stronghold.
combatPreCondition: Play if a Nazgûl is in the battle.
combatText: Choose a Companion. That Companion's Leadership and special abilities are cancelled for this Combat round.
